scripts.dev: npm run build:server && concurrently -n server,vite -c blue,green "npm run server:dev" "node server/wait-for-server.mjs && vite"
scripts.server:dev: node --input-type=module -e "import { readFileSync } from 'fs'; import { config } from 'dotenv'; config({ path: 'server/.env', override: true }); const keyPath = process.env.GOOGLE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_KEY_FILE; if (keyPath) process.env.GOOGLE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_KEY = readFileSync(keyPath, 'utf8'); await import('./dist-server/index.js');"
